title: My Profile
subtitle: Manage your wallet and settings
connectSubtitle: Connect your Stellar wallet to view your information and balance.

tldr.summary: Here you can see your connected Stellar wallet, balances, and quick actions to create events or claim your proofs.
tldr.bullet1Detail: Visible address, copy button, and XLM balance.
tldr.bullet2Detail: Clear CTAs to view SPOTs, create events, and claim.
tldr.bullet3Detail: Clear data, readable states, and option to disconnect.
